mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TBL_COM_LOCATION
LOCATIONNAME LIKE #{search}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_LOCATION ( LOCATIONCODE, WAREHOUSECODE, LOCATIONNAME, RACKCODE, [ROW], [FLOOR], USEYN, PAR_LOCATIONCD, FAILLOCYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{LOCATIONCODE}, #{WAREHOUSECODE}, #{LOCATIONNAME}, #{RACKCODE}, #{ROW}, #{FLOOR}, #{USEYN}, #{PAR_LOCATIONCD}, #{FAILLOCYN}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_LOCATION SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE LOCATIONCODE = #{LOCATIONCODE}
